plan.summary: Split the built-in pattern registry out of pattern-tools while preserving the public pattern-tools facade and search engine behavior.

pre_scan.hotspot: src/tools/pattern-tools.ts is the large, churny pattern catalog and search engine module.
pre_scan.public_contract: Preserve BUILTIN_PATTERNS, searchPatterns, listPatterns, PatternMatch, and PatternResult from src/tools/pattern-tools.ts.
pre_scan.dependency_impact: Existing imports from pattern-tools remain valid; new registry module owns the catalog and definition type.

extractions.signature: searchPatterns(repo, pattern, options), listPatterns(), re-exported BUILTIN_PATTERNS

plan.test_strategy: Run baseline and post-change pattern tests, importer/integration tests, lint, and build; add a registry boundary test for exact object re-export and list order.

progress.result: 3 files passed; 302 tests passed before production edit
Moved BUILTIN_PATTERNS and BuiltinPatternDefinition to src/tools/pattern-registry.ts; pattern-tools imports and re-exports the registry
3 files passed; 303 tests passed after adding registry boundary coverage
tsc build and dist asset copy passed

progress.command: npm test -- tests/integration/tools.test.ts tests/integration/react-tier5-baseline.test.ts tests/tools/php-tools.test.ts tests/tools/python-audit.test.ts tests/tools/review-diff-tools.test.ts

progress.result: Strict audit returned FIX for broad pre-existing per-pattern fixture coverage gaps across the 168-entry registry; split-specific boundary coverage is present
Reported pre-existing searchPatterns engine behavior risks: first-match postFilter, file-level fallback suppression, silent read skips, max_results normalization, and file_pattern substring semantics
CQ11/CQ14/CQ17 passed; CQ13 repeated local-helper false positives that tsc/tests cover

prove.blind_audit: deferred: broad pre-existing registry fixture debt, not introduced by split
prove.adversarial: deferred: pre-existing searchPatterns engine behavior risks, not introduced by split
prove.findings_disposition: This task is a structural split. Behavior-changing searchPatterns fixes and full per-pattern fixture matrix are intentionally left for separate tasks.

notes: src/tools/pattern-tools.ts reduced from 1297 LOC to 322 LOC.
src/tools/pattern-registry.ts owns the 979-line static pattern catalog and BuiltinPatternDefinition.
audit_scan CQ13 reports internal helpers/types as unused despite local usage; TypeScript compilation and full tests passed.
Added explicit coverage that pattern-tools re-exports the exact registry object.
Added listPatterns order/completeness coverage against Object.keys(BUILTIN_PATTERNS).
